title: Playing Table Tennis 打乒乓球
scene: Sam和Tim在体育馆打乒乓球，来回对打。

lines.en: Tim, do you have a ping pong paddle?
Yes, I have two. Let us play!
I will serve first. Watch out!
Nice serve! I will hit it back.
Oh, I missed it. It was too fast.
Try to watch the ball carefully.
OK, my turn to serve again.
Good spin! You are getting better, Sam.
Thanks! This is so much fun.
Let us play for ten more minutes!
